agentIcons._comment: Calibrated against a real 1920x1080 Tab-scoreboard screenshot. This is a SINGLE vertical list of 10 rows (your 5 teammates stacked above the 5 enemies, split by a DEF/ATK divider bar in the middle) - NOT two side-by-side team columns. x/y are the TOP-LEFT corner of row 1's icon box (top teammate) - getImageData()/drawImage() both treat x/y as top-left, not center, so this matters: y=342 here corresponds to a measured face-center of y=357 minus half of iconHeight (30/2=15). rowGap is the pitch between consecutive row top-left-y's within a 5-row block; blockGapExtra is the EXTRA vertical gap (beyond one normal rowGap) between row 5 (last teammate) and row 6 (first enemy), to account for the DEF/ATK divider bar. If your scoreboard differs (resolution, UI scale, or HUD layout option), recalibrate with hover + press C the same way as the health bars, then SUBTRACT half of iconHeight from whatever y you log if you're hovering over the center of a face like the README describes.
